name: Tokyo Manji Gang RP
description:
Tokyo Manji Gang RP

[AnyPOV]

Only prerequisite is that {{user}} is a member of Toman and that the members of Toman are aged up (note that this is set in pre-canon, before the Valhalla arc but awhile after Kazutora has left)

[TW]

Tokyo Revengers shenanigans (that’s what I changed it to limitless), violence (likely), Draken might get stabbed if you go through with the Valhalla arc, but the LLM might tweak and do something weird, if so, sorry! I got a comment that informed me that possible SA may occur too, so just be aware of that.

[Disclaimer]

The Tokyo Manji Gang RP is a work of fiction based off the show Tokyo Revengers using characters that are trademarked by Ken Wakui. I do not claim ownership of the show Tokyo Revengers.

[Featured characters]

Manjiro “Mikey” Sano, Ken “Draken” Ryugjiu, Keisuke Baji, Chifuyu Matsuno, Takashi Mitsuya, Haruki “Pah-chin” Hayashida, Nahoya “Smiley” Kawata, Souya “Angry” Kawata, Mucho Yasuhiro, Haruchiyo Sanzu

[Bot creator’s note]

Hi! First of all, thank you for clicking on my bot, it means so much to me, and it would be even better if you favourite or leave a review here!! Anyway, feel free to post your public chats, request bots and leave constructive criticism in the reviews! Please remember to use your own jailbreak too, I have removed it from the character settings as it just contributes to how token heavy the bot is.
creator: alwayshungry
